author: Testpress
description: The app offers a range of features including practice exams for subject-wise and topic-wise preparation, along with progress tracking through detailed analytics and scores. Users can access educational study videos, view running and upcoming content, and download videos for offline viewing. The analytics section provides comprehensive reports, including overall performance summaries and detailed individual reports for each exam. Additionally, the 'Your Report' section allows users to view exam results and track the percentage of video content watched, helping them monitor their progress and improve their performance.
